author: andrewbrereton
description: Scan your vault for tasks that contain dates. Create an iCalendar file and store it in your vault or on Gist. You can then show this calendar in your Outlook, Google Calendar, Apple Calender, etc

manifest.author: Andrew Brereton
manifest.description: Scans your vault for tasks. Creates an iCal file and stores it on Gist. You can then show this calendar in any iCal compatible client such as Outlook, Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, etc.
manifest.name: iCal

name: iCal

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

* Fix double URL-encoding of obsidian:// links in LOCATION/DESCRIPTION by @andrewbrereton in https://github.com/andrewbrereton/obsidian-to-ical-plugin/pull/215

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/andrewbrereton/obsidian-to-ical-plugin/compare/2.4.0...2.4.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

* Add ignoreCancelledTasks setting (default true) by @andrewbrereton in https://github.com/andrewbrereton/obsidian-to-ical-plugin/pull/180
* Preserve unknown subscription statuses instead of coercing to CANCELED by @andrewbrereton in https://github.com/andrewbrereton/obsidian-to-ical-plugin/pull/181
* Stop firing getCalendar() on every SettingTab re-render by @andrewbrereton in https://github.com/andrewbrereton/obsidian-to-ical-plugin/pull/182
* Migrate ESLint to flat config + add eslint-plugin-obsidianmd + CI lint by @andrewbrereton in https://github.com/andrewbrereton/obsidian-to-ical-plugin/pull/183
* Enable TypeScript strict mode by @andrewbrereton in https://github.com/andrewbrereton/obsidian-to-ical-plugin/pull/184
* Move secrets to per-device localStorage by @andrewbrereton in https://github.com/andrewbrereton/obsidian-to-ical-plugin/pull/185
* Construct fresh ApiClient per access so secretKey changes propagate by @andrewbrereton in https://github.com/andrewbrereton/obsidian-to-ical-plugin/pull/189
* Show Notice when calendar Refresh button fails by @andrewbrereton in https://github.com/andrewbrereton/obsidian-to-ical-plugin/pull/190
* Add one-time Notice for the new ignoreCancelledTasks default by @andrewbrereton in https://github.com/andrewbrereton/obsidian-to-ical-plugin/pull/191
* Drop change-announcement wording from cancelled-tasks Notice by @andrewbrereton in https://github.com/andrewbrereton/obsidian-to-ical-plugin/pull/194
* Clear stale URL on Refresh failure and distinguish not-found from error by @andrewbrereton in https://github.com/andrewbrereton/obsidian-to-ical-plugin/pull/195
* Restore Refresh button after a failed Refresh (regression fix) by @andrewbrereton in https://github.com/andrewbrereton/obsidian-to-ical-plugin/pull/199
* Skip second Refresh click while one is already in flight by @andrewbrereton in https://github.com/andrewbrereton/obsidian-to-ical-plugin/pull/200
* Drop stale fetch results when reset races with in-flight fetch by @andrewbrereton in https://github.com/andrewbrereton/obsidian-to-ical-plugin/pull/201
* Release isFetching on reset() so fetchOnce can start after a race by @andrewbrereton in https://github.com/andrewbrereton/obsidian-to-ical-plugin/pull/203
* Don't log raw SettingsManager — getters leak secrets via DevTools by @andrewbrereton in https://github.com/andrewbrereton/obsidian-to-ical-plugin/pull/205
* Scope dateOverride per iteration to prevent Day Planner leak by @andrewbrereton in https://github.com/andrewbrereton/obsidian-to-ical-plugin/pull/207
* Escape DESCRIPTION and LOCATION as RFC 5545 TEXT by @andrewbrereton in https://github.com/andrewbrereton/obsidian-to-ical-plugin/pull/211
* Use ; (not :) to separate LOCATION property parameter from name by @andrewbrereton in https://github.com/andrewbrereton/obsidian-to-ical-plugin/pull/212
* URL-encode vault name and file path in fileUri construction by @andrewbrereton in https://github.com/andrewbrereton/obsidian-to-ical-plugin/pull/213

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/andrewbrereton/obsidian-to-ical-plugin/compare/2.3.5...2.4.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

* Drop UTC Z suffix from timed event format (#138) by @andrewbrereton in https://github.com/andrewbrereton/obsidian-to-ical-plugin/pull/150

## ⚠️ Behaviour change — please read

If you previously **adapted** to the broken behaviour by entering shifted times (e.g. you live in NYC and typed `13:00-15:00` to make the task display at `08:00-10:00`), this fix will un-do that compensation and your displayed times will move. **You will need to re-enter your tasks with the unshifted (intended) times.**

If you live in UTC, or you only use all-day tasks (no time ranges), or you only use Day Planner via the standard daily-note workflow without ever noticing a shift, you will see **no change** in behaviour.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/andrewbrereton/obsidian-to-ical-plugin/compare/2.0.7...2.0.8

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

Hey everyone! This is a big update that I'm really excited to share with you. The headline feature a companion website that makes hosting and sharing your Obsidian calendars easier!

### Introducing [obsidian-ical.com](https://obsidian-ical.com)

I've built a little website at [obsidian-ical.com](https://obsidian-ical.com) that can host your calendars online, making them accessible from anywhere without needing GitHub or file sharing. Think of it as calendar hosting made simple!

**Here's the important bit**: I want to be crystal clear that I will never lock existing features behind a subscription. Everything you can do today will always remain free. The Pro features are purely additive - they're new conveniences, not restrictions on what you already use.

* Pro by @andrewbrereton in https://github.com/andrewbrereton/obsidian-to-ical-plugin/pull/114
* Add more substantial tests by @andrewbrereton in https://github.com/andrewbrereton/obsidian-to-ical-plugin/pull/113
* Bump @octokit/rest from 21.1.1 to 22.0.0 by @dependabot in https://github.com/andrewbrereton/obsidian-to-ical-plugin/pull/108
* Bump @types/node from 22.15.32 to 24.0.2 by @dependabot in https://github.com/andrewbrereton/obsidian-to-ical-plugin/pull/111

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/andrewbrereton/obsidian-to-ical-plugin/compare/1.22.0...2.0.0

releases.description: Fixes #7

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Support Obsidian Tasks that use [emoji format](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Reference/Task+Formats/Tasks+Emoji+Format)
- For tasks that have a Start Date and a Due Date, make the event span that timeframe
- Add support for In Progress and Canceled status
